CustomField.description: Formula checkbox: true when NOW() is between nepa_public_comment_period_start__c and nepa_public_comment_period_end_date__c. Drives portal OmniScript conditional visibility and CMS page visibility rules without human admin intervention. Recomputed on every page load — no async lag.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Portal comment intake is open when checked. Automatically closes at the exact end datetime — no manual toggle needed.
CustomField.label: Portal Comment Intake Open
